query_title: Gett: The Trial of Viviane Amsalem

recommendations.title: On My Skin
recommendations.overview: The incredible true story behind the most controversial Italian court cases in recent years. Stefano Cucchi was arrested for a minor crime and mysteriously found dead during his detention. In one week's time, a family is changed forever.

recommendations.title: Find Me Guilty
recommendations.overview: Based on the true story of Jack DiNorscio, a mobster who defended himself in court for what would be the longest mafia trial in U.S. history.

recommendations.title: Meet the Leroys
recommendations.overview: A man takes his wife and their teenage children on a road trip down memory lane while facing divorce.

recommendations.title: I Care a Lot
recommendations.overview: A court-appointed legal guardian defrauds her older clients and traps them under her care. But her latest mark comes with some unexpected baggage.

recommendations.title: The Party
recommendations.overview: A thirteen-year-old French girl deals with moving to a new city and school in Paris, while at the same time her parents are getting a divorce.

recommendations.title: The Girl with a Bracelet
recommendations.overview: Lise (16 years old) is accused of murdering her best friend. As the trial starts, her parents stand right by her side. But once her secret life is revealed in court, the truth becomes indistinguishable.

recommendations.title: Under the Same Roof
recommendations.overview: Nadia and Adrián starts their particular world war when she files to divorce him.

recommendations.title: Marshall
recommendations.overview: Thurgood Marshall, the first African-American Supreme Court Justice, battles through one of his career-defining cases.

recommendations.title: Pauline at the Beach
recommendations.overview: Marion is about to divorce from her husband and takes her 15-year-old niece, Pauline, on a vacation to Granville. There, she meets an old love...

recommendations.title: The Perfect Patient
